title: brain index eval — --json success output
description: Retrieval-quality eval over the live index: scores every labeled query's ranked retrieval (the production retrieve → RRF-fuse path, one in-process seam) and aggregates recall@K + MRR per retrieval-index-contract.md and acceptance-thresholds.md §retrieval. Threshold defaults are the graduation-gate constants (recall@10 ≥ 0.85, MRR ≥ 0.7); a below-threshold result exits 1 with this same success payload (pass=false), mirroring `index verify`'s report-then-exit-1 shape. Emits exactly one terminal run.readonly audit event per eval run.

k.description: Top-K recall was computed at (default 10 — the graduation metric).

degradedQueries.description: Queries served in the §6 FTS-maturity fallback (fts layer dropped). Present when > 0.

retrieved.description: The retriever's ranked note ids, truncated to top-K.

firstRelevantRank.description: 1-indexed rank of the first relevant note, null on a miss.

x-atlas-contract.summary: Score the live hybrid retriever against a labeled query set (recall@K + MRR); exit 1 when below the graduation thresholds; emits exactly one terminal run.readonly audit event.

flags.description: Top-K to score recall at; bounds 1..100 (10 = the graduation metric).

sideEffects: one egress embed call per query (the vector layer embeds the query text through the egress broker)
emits exactly one run.readonly git-ref audit event for the whole eval run
prohibitedEffects: no ledger business row written (embed receipts are not persisted; the egress broker's own budget enforcement still applies)
no more than one terminal audit event per run

errorCodes.when: missing/unknown flag, --k out of 1..100, threshold out of [0,1]
queries/labels JSON malformed, version != 1, a query without labels, or a labeled note id absent from the notes projection

an eval query's text normalizes to more than one note's slug/alias (identity layer refuses a silent pick; structurally guarded — normalized_key is the store PK and collisions are refused at ingest, documented for parity with query/note-show/note-history/note-related)
metrics below thresholds (the success payload is still emitted; pass=false)
the SQLite store file is missing or unopenable
the LanceDB index is absent — run `brain index rebuild` first
the egress broker socket is unreachable

a query embed hit a provider-retryable failure (rate limit/quota/timeout/transport); envelope carries retryable:true (+retryAfterMs when known). Exit 4 per the §2.5 cap — retryability lives on the flag, not a code the exit set does not define (query.ts convention)
a query embed failed non-retryably (provider validation/auth or egress refusal)
